name: Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the beaten egg to the mixture and stir well.
3. Gradually mix in the dry ingredients: baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and cloves with flour.
4. Stir in the raisins and nuts.
5. Mix in the hot applesauce until combined.
6. Pour the batter into a greased cake pan.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for approximately 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving. It will stay moist for several days.
